entries.summary: observed session qa-g5-s9-worker state busy (staleness 9.7s) [pane pattern: mcp_startup]

details.criterion: A durable worker handoff records current status, next steps, and known risks.
details.proof: handoff.json records summary, next steps, and known risks.

entries.summary: accepted criterion #1: A durable worker handoff records current status, next steps, and known risks.

details.criterion: Accepted resume-safety criteria and a deferred compact/clear follow-up remain visible after resume.
details.proof: criteria list before/after resume must show accepted and deferred state.

entries.summary: accepted criterion #2: Accepted resume-safety criteria and a deferred compact/clear follow-up remain visible after resume.

details.criterion: A resumed manager records a decision based on durable replay/export/handoff/criteria state, not live chat memory.
details.proof: resumed decision payload must name replay, export, handoff, and criteria evidence.

entries.summary: accepted criterion #3: A resumed manager records a decision based on durable replay/export/handoff/criteria state, not live chat memory.

details.criterion: Run the same resume drill with actual compact/clear only after handoff and manager permission are configured.
details.rationale: Follow-up after this Gate 5 QA slice; compact/clear is intentionally not used here.

entries.summary: deferred criterion #4: Follow-up after this Gate 5 QA slice; compact/clear is intentionally not used here.

task.goal: Gate 5 Scenario 9 resume/handoff dogfood: prove durable handoff, replay/export, criteria state, and resumed manager decision are enough to continue without live chat memory.
task.name: qa-g5-s9-resume
task.summary: Disposable isolated Scenario 9 resume and handoff dogfood.
